nasb.text: Now Saul told Jonathan his son and all his servants to put David to death. But Jonathan, Saul’s son, greatly delighted in David.

esv.text: And Saul spoke to Jonathan his son and to all his servants, that they should kill David. But Jonathan, Saul’s son, delighted much in David.

cnv.text: 掃羅吩咐他的兒子約拿單和他所有的臣僕要把大衛殺死，但掃羅的兒子約拿單非常喜愛大衛。

ccb.text: 扫罗吩咐他儿子约拿单和众臣仆去杀掉大卫。但约拿单非常喜爱大卫，
